meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to build high-converting user onboarding to solve the 'no project ideas' trap. An intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The 'no project ideas' paradox stems from a lack of focus on user friction. By building modular, AI-driven onboarding flows, you solve the retention problem first. Use Antigravity to scaffold your UI and Claude Code to refine the logic, transforming a simple idea into a high-converting, revenue-ready SaaS MVP.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You stare at the cursor, waiting for the 'perfect' idea to strike, while the market screams for solutions to existing, painful workflows. The trap isn't a lack of creativity; it's a lack of architectural focus. Every successful SaaS started not as a grand vision, but as a friction-less solution to a specific user problem.

Stop chasing the 'next big thing' and start building the 'first necessary thing.' By mastering user onboarding, you create a feedback loop that uncovers the very ideas you are currently missing. Let’s turn your technical curiosity into a high-velocity build engine.

steps.title: Define the Friction-First MVP
steps.description: Identify a specific user pain point where onboarding is currently broken and sketch a flow that solves it in under 60 seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-fidelity landing page mockup with a 3-step interactive onboarding flow centered on user pain-point identification.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Scaffold a Next.js component for a 3-step user onboarding wizard with Framer Motion transitions.'

steps.title: Build the Context-Aware Logic
steps.description: Implement logic that adapts the onboarding experience based on user inputs to ensure high conversion rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a dynamic state machine for an onboarding flow that branches based on user persona selection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Refactor the onboarding state machine to handle conditional logic based on user profile completion.'

steps.title: Integrate AI-Driven Personalization
steps.description: Use AI to analyze user intent during onboarding and provide immediate, personalized value propositions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer that calls an LLM to generate a personalized 'Value Summary' based on user inputs during the onboarding steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Connect the onboarding form data to an Anthropic API endpoint to generate dynamic user insights.'

steps.title: Automate Data Persistence
steps.description: Ensure every step of the onboarding is saved to your database, allowing users to return without losing progress.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema and API routes for saving partial onboarding progress for authenticated users.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement PostgreSQL persistence for the onboarding wizard using Prisma and Next.js server actions.'

steps.title: Optimize for Conversion Metrics
steps.description: Add analytics hooks to track drop-off points in your onboarding flow to iterate on your UX.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add PostHog tracking events to each step of the onboarding flow to measure completion rates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Instrument the onboarding flow with PostHog analytics for step-by-step conversion tracking.'

pro_tips: Never ask for a password until the user has experienced at least one 'Aha!' moment in your flow.
Use skeleton loaders during AI generation steps to keep perceived latency below 200ms.
Implement 'optimistic UI' updates so the interface feels instantaneous even when waiting for backend validation.
Always include a 'Skip' button; forcing users through onboarding creates resentment, not retention.
Track the time-to-value (TTV) metric; if your onboarding takes longer than 90 seconds, you are losing 40% of your leads.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, deploy to Vercel and run 50 users through the funnel. Analyze the drop-off data in PostHog to refine your copy and eliminate friction points.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the blueprint to turn any idea into a functional, market-ready MVP. Don't let another day pass in the 'idea void'—start shipping, start measuring, and start scaling your SaaS business today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
